heading: Section 485 as extending to revised boundaries; lands acquired by exchange
label: 21c Section 485 as extending to revised boundaries; lands acquired by exchange
text: The provisions of shall continue to be applicable to the areas included within the Yellowstone National Park by , and any lands within such areas acquired by exchange thereunder shall thereupon become a part of the Yellowstone National Park.section 485 of this titlesection 21a of this title
